# llms.txt

Repository: golden-repo-ai-review-system

Purpose:
Deterministic-first universal change governance engine for L9-aligned engine repositories.

Primary runtime facts:
- Normalized review input contract: tools/review/schemas/change_proposal.schema.json
- Normalized final output contract: tools/review/schemas/governance_decision.schema.json
- Deterministic analyzers live under tools/review/analyzers/
- Final decision composer: tools/review/aggregate.py
- Waivers: tools/review/waivers.py + tools/review/policy/review_exceptions.yaml
- Example engine chassis bridge: engine/handlers.py

Hard rules:
- engine/ must not define HTTP routes
- tools/review/ must not be imported by engine runtime code
- semantic review is conditional and non-sovereign
- workflows must match actual CLI signatures
